styles_type1.name: KVTM
styles_type1.prompt: A horizontal 3-view character turnaround sheet of an adorable, bright Khu Vuon Tren May chibi style character: front view, side view, back view. Big cute eyes, smooth clay-like surfaces, plastic toy shader, vibrant colors, fantasy plants details, soft ambient lighting, white backdrop, generous margins
